meaning: n.凡人,人类adj.必死的,致命的,人类的,临终的adj.<口>极端的,非常大(长)的
examples: The police were defending themselves and others against mortal danger.
They were not elfin maidens, but mortal children.
It is only by participating in this divine life that mortal, fragile human beings fulfil their potential.
She felt the solid thumps of her heart, she knew she was vulnerable and mortal.
